364 GG0170N3_4_STP_END_CD GG0170N3_4_STP_END_CD GG0170N3 Discharge Performance 4 Steps Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's ability to go up and down four steps with or without a rail at the time of discharge. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's ability to go up and down four steps with or without a rail at the time of discharge. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal assistance
03 = Partial/moderate assistance
04 = Supervision or
